docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF GAVY AGGARWAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA WYNNE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGGARWAL, GAVY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WYNNE, PATRICIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
